description:
A desktop app for ComfyUI, the most powerful and modular diffusion model GUI, api and backend with a graph/nodes interface

ComfyUI Desktop is a packaged way to use ComfyUI and comes bundled with a few things:
- Stable version of ComfyUI from releases
- ComfyUI_frontend
- ComfyUI-Manager
- uv
On startup, it will install all the necessary python dependencies with uv and start the ComfyUI server. The app will automatically update with stable releases of ComfyUI, ComfyUI-Manager, and the uv executable as well as some desktop specific features.
What's Changed
- Use upstream Manager. by @robinjhuang in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/912
- v0.4.24 by @robinjhuang in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1005
- Fix auto package update prompting user instead by @webfiltered in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1010
- [API] Add disableCustomNodes endpoint by @webfiltered in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/966
- comfyui frontend v1.10.17 by @robinjhuang in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1007
- v0.4.25 by @robinjhuang in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1008
- Increase size limit for ToDesktop uploads. by @robinjhuang in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1009
- v0.4.26 by @robinjhuang in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1011
- [e2e] Ignore desktop version in screenshot validation by @webfiltered in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1004
- [e2e] Add update test expectations procedure by @webfiltered in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1003
Full Changelog: https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/compare/v0.4.23...v0.4.26
